location.office_time_required: 3 days per week (Tuesdays, Thursdays, and a flex day); up to 4 weeks remote per year

level_signals: 7+ years of experience in product at a high-growth tech startup
Comp range $220K-$302.5K base consistent with Staff-level IC at a growth-stage company
Makes decisions alongside company founders and the CEO

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 7+ years of experience in product at a high-growth tech startup or as a startup founder with experience working on complex Search systems
You have 7+ years of experience in product at a high-growth tech startup or as a startup founder with experience working on complex Search systems
You have experience building high-scale products through state-of-the-art engineering and data science
You regularly use ML/AI to solve business problems and are well-versed with recent advancements in the field.
You're an extraordinarily fast learner. You have the natural curiosity and intellectual horsepower to deeply understand new topics and pick up new skills in a very short time.

You are relentlessly resourceful. When something needs to get done, you always find a way to make it happen. Even when the work is hard, you power through it and execute with limited information and ambiguity.
You are a creative problem-solver. You excel at identifying unintuitive solutions to tough problems.
You care deeply about developing products and solutions that will create the best experience for our customers.

scope.surface: Search algorithms powering the Discovery pillar — the largest discovery surface by order volume on Faire's wholesale marketplace
scope.business_model: B2B marketplace / wholesale platform connecting independent retailers with brands
primary_metrics_inferred: Retailer search experience quality (offline and online metrics)
Search algorithm performance across query segments
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute on a strategy that takes our search algorithms to the next level
Refine our breakdown of key search query segments, identify novel opportunities for improvements, and diagnose root causes for today's failure modes
Refine our suite of offline and online metrics to help us better understand the retailer's search experience and the performance of each component of our search system
Evaluate tradeoffs between technical solutions across velocity, scale, cost, and modularity
Work with and learn from a broad range of world-class leaders across engineering, product management, data science, design, and operations
Make decisions alongside company founders and the CEO

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed and wide ($220K-$302.5K base)
Clear product surface with explicit ownership of a high-impact area (search, largest discovery surface by order volume)
Backed by top-tier investors (Y Combinator, Sequoia, Founders Fund, etc.)
Well-defined hybrid policy (3 days/week with up to 4 weeks fully remote)
red_flags: No visa sponsorship information stated — unclear for international candidates
Hybrid requirement (3 days/week in SF office) eliminates fully remote candidates
7+ years hard requirement combined with Staff title creates a narrow candidate pool
No mention of specific technologies used in search stack, making it hard to self-assess technical fit

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from role title 'Staff', comp range, and responsibility to work directly with founders/CEO)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from salary header specifying 'San Francisco, CA' — implies other locations may differ)
ambiguities: The '7+ years' requirement reads 'at a high-growth tech startup OR as a startup founder' — it is unclear whether founding experience alone (without PM title) fully satisfies the requirement; treated as hard but noted.

The 'complex Search systems' experience is bundled in the same bullet as years-of-experience; could be interpreted as a separate hard requirement or as a qualifier on the startup context. Extracted as two separate requirements.
Location pay differential is implied by the city-specific salary header but no other city ranges are provided.
